observations: oracle rows were exported with EGraph::function_for_each, not print-function
DD results are netted from signed diffs before logical-row comparison
relation identity projects i64 input columns and keeps raw lower-row output ids as debug evidence
limitations: this acceptance gate is relation-only over i64 values
equality/rebuild, containers, custom schedulers, primitives, extraction, proofs, and direct ResolvedCoreRule export remain follow-up probes
performance measurement is intentionally deferred until semantic acceptance is stable
